faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in Astoria homes?
faqs.answer: The most common pantry pests we treat in Astoria include Indian meal moths, flour beetles, grain weevils, and cigarette beetles. These pests infest dry goods like flour, cereal, pasta, rice, nuts, and dried fruits. They can enter homes through contaminated groceries or small cracks in older buildings common throughout Astoria.

faqs.answer: Our pantry pest control services in Astoria range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation and the size of your home. This includes a thorough inspection, treatment of affected areas, disposal recommendations, and follow-up guidance to prevent re-infestation.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Astoria, Queens. Once you contact us, we can typically schedule an inspection within 24 hours. faqs.question: How can I prevent pantry pests from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: After treatment, we recommend storing all dry goods in airtight containers, regularly cleaning pantry shelves, inspecting groceries before storing them, and sealing any cracks or gaps in your kitchen. We'll provide specific prevention tips based on your Astoria home's layout and any vulnerabilities we identify during our inspection.
